```
Output:
warning: Not a git repository. Use --no-index to compare two paths outside a working tree
usage: git diff --no-index [<options>] <path> <path>

Diff output format options
    -p, --patch           generate patch
    -s, --no-patch        suppress diff output
    -u                    generate patch
    -U, --unified[=<n>]   generate diffs with <n> lines context
    -W, --function-context
                          generate diffs with <n> lines context
    --raw                 generate the diff in raw format
    --patch-with-raw      synonym for '-p --raw'
    --patch-with-stat     synonym for '-p --stat'
    --numstat             machine friendly --stat
    --shortstat           output only the last line of --stat
    -X, --dirstat[=<param1,param2>...]
                          output the distribution of relative amount of changes for each sub-directory
    --cumulative          synonym for --dirstat=cumulative
    --dirstat-by-file[=<param1,param2>...]
                          synonym for --dirstat=files,param1,param2...
    --check               warn if changes introduce conflict markers or whitespace errors
    --summary             condensed summary such as creations, renames and mode changes
    --name-only           show only names of changed files
    --name-status         show only names and status of changed files
    --stat[=<width>[,<name-width>[,<count>]]]
                          generate diffstat
    --stat-width <width>  generate diffstat with a given width
    --stat-name-width <width>
                          generate diffstat with a given name width
    --stat-graph-width <width>
                          generate diffstat with a given graph width
    --stat-count <count>  generate diffstat with limited lines
    --compact-summary     generate compact summary in diffstat
    --binary              output a binary diff that can be applied
    --full-index          show full pre- and post-image object names on the "index" lines
    --color[=<when>]      show colored diff
    --ws-error-highlight <kind>
                          highlight whitespace errors in the 'context', 'old' or 'new' lines in the diff
    -z                    do not munge pathnames and use NULs as output field terminators in --raw or --numstat
    --abbrev[=<n>]        use <n> digits to display object names
    --src-prefix <prefix> show the given source prefix instead of "a/"
    --dst-prefix <prefix> show the given destination prefix instead of "b/"
    --line-prefix <prefix>
                          prepend an additional prefix to every line of output
    --no-prefix           do not show any source or destination prefix
    --default-prefix      use default prefixes a/ and b/
    --inter-hunk-context <n>
                          show context between diff hunks up to the specified number of lines
    --output-indicator-new <char>
                          specify the character to indicate a new line instead of '+'
    --output-indicator-old <char>
                          specify the character to indicate an old line instead of '-'
    --output-indicator-context <char>
                          specify the character to indicate a context instead of ' '

Diff rename options
    -B, --break-rewrites[=<n>[/<m>]]
                          break complete rewrite changes into pairs of delete and create
    -M, --find-renames[=<n>]
                          detect renames
    -D, --irreversible-delete
                          omit the preimage for deletes
    -C, --find-copies[=<n>]
                          detect copies
    --find-copies-harder  use unmodified files as source to find copies
    --no-renames          disable rename detection
    --rename-empty        use empty blobs as rename source
    --follow              continue listing the history of a file beyond renames
    -l <n>                prevent rename/copy detection if the number of rename/copy targets exceeds given limit

Diff algorithm options
    --minimal             produce the smallest possible diff
    -w, --ignore-all-space
                          ignore whitespace when comparing lines
    -b, --ignore-space-change
                          ignore changes in amount of whitespace
    --ignore-space-at-eol ignore changes in whitespace at EOL
    --ignore-cr-at-eol    ignore carrier-return at the end of line
    --ignore-blank-lines  ignore changes whose lines are all blank
    -I, --ignore-matching-lines <regex>
                          ignore changes whose all lines match <regex>
    --indent-heuristic    heuristic to shift diff hunk boundaries for easy reading
    --patience            generate diff using the "patience diff" algorithm
    --histogram           generate diff using the "histogram diff" algorithm
    --diff-algorithm <algorithm>
                          choose a diff algorithm
    --anchored <text>     generate diff using the "anchored diff" algorithm
    --word-diff[=<mode>]  show word diff, using <mode> to delimit changed words
    --word-diff-regex <regex>
                          use <regex> to decide what a word is
    --color-words[=<regex>]
                          equivalent to --word-diff=color --word-diff-regex=<regex>
    --color-moved[=<mode>]
                          moved lines of code are colored differently
    --color-moved-ws <mode>
                          how white spaces are ignored in --color-moved

Other diff options
    --relative[=<prefix>] when run from subdir, exclude changes outside and show relative paths
    -a, --text            treat all files as text
    -R                    swap two inputs, reverse the diff
    --exit-code           exit with 1 if there were differences, 0 otherwise
    --quiet               disable all output of the program
    --ext-diff            allow an external diff helper to be executed
    --textconv            run external text conversion filters when comparing binary files
    --ignore-submodules[=<when>]
                          ignore changes to submodules in the diff generation
    --submodule[=<format>]
                          specify how differences in submodules are shown
    --ita-invisible-in-index
                          hide 'git add -N' entries from the index
    --ita-visible-in-index
                          treat 'git add -N' entries as real in the index
    -S <string>           look for differences that change the number of occurrences of the specified string
    -G <regex>            look for differences that change the number of occurrences of the specified regex
    --pickaxe-all         show all changes in the changeset with -S or -G
    --pickaxe-regex       treat <string> in -S as extended POSIX regular expression
    -O <file>             control the order in which files appear in the output
    --rotate-to <path>    show the change in the specified path first
    --skip-to <path>      skip the output to the specified path
    --find-object <object-id>
                          look for differences that change the number of occurrences of the specified object
    --diff-filter [(A|C|D|M|R|T|U|X|B)...[*]]
                          select files by diff type
    --output <file>       output to a specific file


```

```
  35:     private val contentState = MutableStateFlow<ContentItem?>(null)
  36:     private val engineState = MutableStateFlow(TtsEngineState.INITIALIZING)
  37:     private val playbackState = MutableStateFlow(PlaybackState.IDLE)
  38:     private val currentParagraphIndex = MutableStateFlow(0)
  39:     private val currentWordHighlight = MutableStateFlow<WordHighlight?>(null)
  40:     private val errorMessage = MutableStateFlow<String?>(null)
  41:     private val speechSettings = MutableStateFlow(SpeechSettings())
  42:     private var restoredProgress = false
  43:     private var pendingPlay = false
  44:     private var textToSpeech: TextToSpeech? = null
  45:     private var activeUtteranceId: String? = null
  46:     private var activeChunks: List<SpeechChunk> = emptyList()
  47:     private var activeChunkIndex: Int = 0
  48: 
  49:     private val readerSnapshot = combine(
  50:         contentState,
  51:         engineState,
  52:         playbackState,
  53:         currentParagraphIndex
  54:     ) { content, engine, playback, paragraphIndex ->
  55:         val paragraphs = content?.let { splitIntoParagraphs(it.extractedText) }.orEmpty()
  56:         val safeIndex = paragraphIndex.coerceIn(0, maxOf(paragraphs.lastIndex, 0))
  57:         ReaderSnapshot(
  58:             content = content,
  59:             paragraphs = paragraphs,
  60:             currentParagraphIndex = safeIndex,
  61:             isTtsReady = engine == TtsEngineState.READY,
  62:             isPlaying = playback == PlaybackState.PLAYING,
  63:             canResume = playback == PlaybackState.PAUSED,
  64:             canSkipForward = paragraphs.isNotEmpty() && safeIndex < paragraphs.lastIndex,
  65:             canRestart = paragraphs.isNotEmpty() && (safeIndex > 0 || playback != PlaybackState.IDLE),
  66:             isLoadingVoice = engine == TtsEngineState.INITIALIZING,
  67:             statusMessage = buildStatusMessage(engine, playback, safeIndex, paragraphs.size)
  68:         )
  69:     }
  70: 
  71:     val uiState: StateFlow<ReaderUiState> = combine(
  72:         readerSnapshot,
  73:         currentWordHighlight,
  74:         errorMessage
  75:     ) { snapshot, wordHighlight, error ->
  76:         ReaderUiState(
  77:             content = snapshot.content,
  78:             paragraphs = snapshot.paragraphs,
  79:             currentParagraphIndex = snapshot.currentParagraphIndex,
  80:             currentWordHighlight = if (snapshot.isPlaying) wordHighlight else null,
  81:             isTtsReady = snapshot.isTtsReady,
  82:             isPlaying = snapshot.isPlaying,
  83:             canResume = snapshot.canResume,
  84:             canSkipForward = snapshot.canSkipForward,
  85:             canRestart = snapshot.canRestart,
  86:             isLoadingVoice = snapshot.isLoadingVoice,
  87:             statusMessage = snapshot.statusMessage,
  88:             errorMessage = error
  89:         )
  90:     }.stateIn(
  91:         scope = viewModelScope,
  92:         started = SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5_000),
  93:         initialValue = ReaderUiState()
  94:     )
  95: 
  96:     init {
  97:         observeContent()
  98:         observeSpeechSettings()
  99:         initializeTextToSpeech()
 100:     }
 101: 
 102:     fun play() {
 103:         val content = contentState.value ?: return
 104:         val paragraphs = splitIntoParagraphs(content.extractedText)
 105:         if (paragraphs.isEmpty()) {
 106:             errorMessage.value = "There isn't enough extracted text to read aloud yet."
 107:             return
 108:         }
 109: 
 110:         if (engineState.value != TtsEngineState.READY) {
 111:             pendingPlay = true
 112:             errorMessage.value = if (engineState.value == TtsEngineState.FAILED) {
 113:                 "Text-to-speech isn't ready on this device yet."
 114:             } else {
 115:                 "Preparing the speech engine..."
 116:             }
 117:             return
 118:         }
 119: 
 120:         speakParagraph(
 121:             content = content,
 122:             paragraphs = paragraphs,
 123:             paragraphIndex = currentParagraphIndex.value.coerceIn(0, paragraphs.lastIndex)
 124:         )
 125:     }
 126: 
 127:     fun stop() {
 128:         pendingPlay = false
 129:         if (playbackState.value == PlaybackState.PLAYING) {
 130:             resetActiveSpeech()
 131:             textToSpeech?.stop()
 132:             playbackState.value = PlaybackState.PAUSED
 133:         }
 134:     }
 135: 
 136:     fun resume() {
 137:         if (playbackState.value == PlaybackState.PAUSED) {
 138:             play()
 139:         }
 140:     }
 141: 
 142:     fun skipToNextParagraph() {
 143:         val content = contentState.value ?: return
 144:         val paragraphs = splitIntoParagraphs(content.extractedText)
 145:         if (paragraphs.isEmpty()) return
 146: 
 147:         val nextIndex = (currentParagraphIndex.value + 1).coerceAtMost(paragraphs.lastIndex)
 148:         if (nextIndex == currentParagraphIndex.value && nextIndex == paragraphs.lastIndex) {
 149:             return
 150:         }
 151: 
 152:         currentParagraphIndex.value = nextIndex
 153:         persistReadingProgress(nextIndex)
 154: 
 155:         if (playbackState.value == PlaybackState.PLAYING) {
 156:             resetActiveSpeech()
 157:             textToSpeech?.stop()
 158:             speakParagraph(content, paragraphs, nextIndex)
 159:         }
 160:     }
 161: 
 162:     fun restart() {
 163:         val content = contentState.value ?: return
 164:         val paragraphs = splitIntoParagraphs(content.extractedText)
 165:         if (paragraphs.isEmpty()) return
 166: 
 167:         currentParagraphIndex.value = 0
 168:         persistReadingProgress(0)
 169: 
 170:         if (playbackState.value == PlaybackState.PLAYING) {
 171:             resetActiveSpeech()
 172:             textToSpeech?.stop()
 173:             speakParagraph(content, paragraphs, 0)
 174:         } else {
 175:             resetActiveSpeech()
 176:             playbackState.value = PlaybackState.PAUSED
 177:         }
 178:     }
 179: 
 180:     override fun onCleared() {
 181:         resetActiveSpeech()
 182:         textToSpeech?.stop()
 183:         textToSpeech?.shutdown()
 184:         super.onCleared()
 185:     }
 186: 
 187:     private fun observeContent() {
 188:         viewModelScope.launch {
 189:             contentRepository.observeItem(contentId).collect { content ->
 190:                 contentState.value = content
 191:                 if (!restoredProgress && content != null) {
 192:                     currentParagraphIndex.value = content.lastReadParagraphIndex
 193:                     restoredProgress = true
 194:                 }
 195:             }
 196:         }
 197:     }
 198: 
 199:     private fun observeSpeechSettings() {
 200:         viewModelScope.launch {
 201:             settingsRepository.observeSpeechSettings().collect { settings ->
 202:                 speechSettings.value = settings
 203:             }
 204:         }
 205:     }
 206: 
 207:     private fun initializeTextToSpeech() {
 208:         textToSpeech = TextToSpeech(context) { status ->
 209:             if (status == TextToSpeech.SUCCESS) {
 210:                 textToSpeech?.setOnUtteranceProgressListener(object : UtteranceProgressListener() {
 211:                     override fun onStart(utteranceId: String?) = Unit
 212: 
 213:                     override fun onRangeStart(
 214:                         utteranceId: String?,
 215:                         start: Int,
 216:                         end: Int,
 217:                         frame: Int
 218:                     ) {
 219:                         if (utteranceId != activeUtteranceId) return
 220: 
 221:                         val chunkOffset = activeChunks.getOrNull(activeChunkIndex)?.startOffset ?: 0
 222:                         currentWordHighlight.value = WordHighlight(
 223:                             start = chunkOffset + start,
 224:                             endExclusive = chunkOffset + end
 225:                         )
 226:                     }
 227: 
 228:                     override fun onDone(utteranceId: String?) {
 229:                         if (utteranceId != activeUtteranceId) return
 230:                         viewModelScope.launch {
 231:                             handleChunkCompleted()
 232:                         }
 233:                     }
 234: 
 235:                     override fun onError(utteranceId: String?) {
 236:                         if (utteranceId != activeUtteranceId) return
 237:                         viewModelScope.launch {
 238:                             resetActiveSpeech()
 239:                             errorMessage.value = "The speech engine failed while reading."
 240:                             playbackState.value = PlaybackState.PAUSED
 241:                         }
 242:                     }
 243: 
 244:                     override fun onError(utteranceId: String?, errorCode: Int) {
 245:                         if (utteranceId != activeUtteranceId) return
 246:                         viewModelScope.launch {
 247:                             resetActiveSpeech()
 248:                             errorMessage.value = when (errorCode) {
 249:                                 TextToSpeech.ERROR_INVALID_REQUEST ->
 250:                                     "The speech engine rejected that text chunk. I've reduced chunk sizes, so please try Play again."
 251:                                 else -> "The speech engine failed with code $errorCode."
 252:                             }
 253:                             playbackState.value = PlaybackState.PAUSED
 254:                         }
 255:                     }
 256:                 })
 257: 
 258:                 engineState.value = TtsEngineState.READY
 259:                 errorMessage.value = null
 260:                 if (pendingPlay) {
 261:                     pendingPlay = false
 262:                     play()
 263:                 }
 264:             } else {
 265:                 engineState.value = TtsEngineState.FAILED
 266:                 errorMessage.value = "Text-to-speech couldn't initialize on this device."
 267:             }
 268:         }
 269:     }
 270: 
 271:     private suspend fun handleChunkCompleted() {
 272:         if (playbackState.value != PlaybackState.PLAYING) return
 273: 
 274:         val content = contentState.value ?: return
 275:         val paragraphs = splitIntoParagraphs(content.extractedText)
 276:         if (paragraphs.isEmpty()) return
 277: 
 278:         if (activeChunkIndex < activeChunks.lastIndex) {
 279:             speakChunk(
 280:                 contentId = content.id,
 281:                 paragraphIndex = currentParagraphIndex.value,
 282:                 chunks = activeChunks,
 283:                 chunkIndex = activeChunkIndex + 1
 284:             )
 285:             return
 286:         }
 287: 
 288:         handleParagraphCompleted(content, paragraphs)
 289:     }
 290: 
 291:     private suspend fun handleParagraphCompleted(
 292:         content: ContentItem,
 293:         paragraphs: List<String>
 294:     ) {
 295:         if (playbackState.value != PlaybackState.PLAYING) return
 296: 
 297:         val nextIndex = currentParagraphIndex.value + 1
 298:         if (nextIndex > paragraphs.lastIndex) {
 299:             resetActiveSpeech()
 300:             playbackState.value = PlaybackState.IDLE
 301:             return
 302:         }
 303: 
 304:         currentParagraphIndex.value = nextIndex
 305:         persistReadingProgress(nextIndex)
 306:         speakParagraph(content, paragraphs, nextIndex)
 307:     }
 308: 
 309:     private fun speakParagraph(
 310:         content: ContentItem,
 311:         paragraphs: List<String>,
 312:         paragraphIndex: Int
 313:     ) {
 314:         val tts = textToSpeech ?: return
 315:         val paragraph = paragraphs.getOrNull(paragraphIndex) ?: return
 316: 
 317:         if (!setLanguageForContent(tts, content, speechSettings.value)) {
 318:             resetActiveSpeech()
 319:             playbackState.value = PlaybackState.PAUSED
 320:             errorMessage.value = "No compatible offline voice is available for this article right now."
 321:             return
 322:         }
 323: 
 324:         val chunks = buildSpeechChunks(paragraph)
 325:         if (chunks.isEmpty()) {
 326:             resetActiveSpeech()
 327:             errorMessage.value = "There isn't enough extracted text to read aloud yet."
 328:             playbackState.value = PlaybackState.PAUSED
 329:             return
 330:         }
 331: 
 332:         currentParagraphIndex.value = paragraphIndex
 333:         persistReadingProgress(paragraphIndex)
 334:         errorMessage.value = null
 335:         playbackState.value = PlaybackState.PLAYING
 336: 
 337:         speakChunk(
 338:             contentId = content.id,
 339:             paragraphIndex = paragraphIndex,
 340:             chunks = chunks,
 341:             chunkIndex = 0
 342:         )
 343:     }
 344: 
 345:     private fun setLanguageForContent(
 346:         tts: TextToSpeech,
 347:         content: ContentItem,
 348:         settings: SpeechSettings
 349:     ): Boolean {
 350:         val targetLanguageCode = if (settings.autoDetectLanguage) {
 351:             content.languageCode
 352:                 ?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
 353:                 ?: languageDetector.detectLanguageCode(content.extractedText)
 354:                 ?: Locale.getDefault().language
 355:         } else {
 356:             settings.preferredLanguageCode
 357:         }
 358: 
 359:         val localeTag = SupportedLanguage.fromCode(targetLanguageCode)?.localeTag ?: targetLanguageCode
 360:         val requestedLocale = localeTag
 361:             .takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
 362:             ?.let(Locale::forLanguageTag)
 363: 
 364:         val requestedResult = requestedLocale?.let { locale ->
 365:             tts.setLanguage(locale)
 366:         }
 367: 
 368:         val localeUnsupported = requestedResult == TextToSpeech.LANG_MISSING_DATA ||
 369:             requestedResult == TextToSpeech.LANG_NOT_SUPPORTED
 370: 
 371:         if (requestedLocale == null || localeUnsupported) {
 372:             val fallbackResult = tts.setLanguage(Locale.getDefault())
 373:             if (fallbackResult == TextToSpeech.LANG_MISSING_DATA ||
 374:                 fallbackResult == TextToSpeech.LANG_NOT_SUPPORTED
 375:             ) {
 376:                 return false
 377:             }
 378:         }
 379: 
 380:         return true
 381:     }
 382: 
 383:     private fun persistReadingProgress(paragraphIndex: Int) {
 384:         viewModelScope.launch {
 385:             contentRepository.updateReadingProgress(
 386:                 id = contentId,
 387:                 lastReadPosition = 0,
 388:                 lastReadParagraphIndex = paragraphIndex
 389:             )
 390:         }
 391:     }
 392: 
 393:     private fun speakChunk(
 394:         contentId: Long,
 395:         paragraphIndex: Int,
 396:         chunks: List<SpeechChunk>,
 397:         chunkIndex: Int
 398:     ) {
 399:         val tts = textToSpeech ?: return
 400:         val chunk = chunks.getOrNull(chunkIndex) ?: return
 401: 
 402:         activeChunks = chunks
 403:         activeChunkIndex = chunkIndex
 404:         currentWordHighlight.value = null
 405: 
 406:         val utteranceId = "$contentId-$paragraphIndex-$chunkIndex-${System.currentTimeMillis()}"
 407:         activeUtteranceId = utteranceId
 408: 
 409:         val speakResult = tts.speak(chunk.text, TextToSpeech.QUEUE_FLUSH, null, utteranceId)
 410:         if (speakResult != TextToSpeech.SUCCESS) {
 411:             resetActiveSpeech()
 412:             playbackState.value = PlaybackState.PAUSED
 413:             errorMessage.value = "The speech engine couldn't start that text chunk. Please try Play again."
 414:         }
 415:     }
 416: 
 417:     private fun buildSpeechChunks(paragraph: String): List<SpeechChunk> {
 418:         val maxChunkLength = (TextToSpeech.getMaxSpeechInputLength() - 200).coerceAtLeast(500)
 419:         val wordMatches = Regex("\\S+").findAll(paragraph).toList()
 420:         if (wordMatches.isEmpty()) return emptyList()
 421: 
 422:         val chunks = mutableListOf<SpeechChunk>()
 423:         var chunkStart = wordMatches.first().range.first
 424:         var chunkEnd = wordMatches.first().range.last + 1
 425: 
 426:         for (index in 1 until wordMatches.size) {
 427:             val nextWord = wordMatches[index]
 428:             val nextEnd = nextWord.range.last + 1
 429: 
 430:             if (nextEnd - chunkStart > maxChunkLength) {
 431:                 chunks += SpeechChunk(
 432:                     text = paragraph.substring(chunkStart, chunkEnd).trim(),
 433:                     startOffset = chunkStart
 434:                 )
 435:                 chunkStart = nextWord.range.first
 436:             }
 437: 
 438:             chunkEnd = nextEnd
 439:         }
 440: 
 441:         chunks += SpeechChunk(
 442:             text = paragraph.substring(chunkStart, chunkEnd).trim(),
 443:             startOffset = chunkStart
 444:         )
 445: 
 446:         return chunks.filter { it.text.isNotBlank() }
 447:     }
 448: 
 449:     private fun resetActiveSpeech() {
 450:         activeUtteranceId = null
 451:         activeChunks = emptyList()
 452:         activeChunkIndex = 0
 453:         currentWordHighlight.value = null
 454:     }
 455: 
 456:     private fun buildStatusMessage(
 457:         engineState: TtsEngineState,
 458:         playbackState: PlaybackState,
 459:         currentParagraphIndex: Int,
 460:         paragraphCount: Int
 461:     ): String {
 462:         if (paragraphCount == 0) return "No readable paragraphs detected yet."
 463: 
 464:         return when {
 465:             engineState == TtsEngineState.INITIALIZING -> "Preparing text-to-speech..."
 466:             engineState == TtsEngineState.FAILED -> "Text-to-speech is unavailable on this device."
 467:             playbackState == PlaybackState.PLAYING ->
 468:                 "Reading paragraph ${currentParagraphIndex + 1} of $paragraphCount"
 469:             playbackState == PlaybackState.PAUSED ->
 470:                 "Paused at paragraph ${currentParagraphIndex + 1} of $paragraphCount"
 471:             else ->
 472:                 "Ready to read from paragraph ${currentParagraphIndex + 1} of $paragraphCount"
 473:         }
 474:     }
 475: 
 476:     private fun splitIntoParagraphs(text: String): List<String> {
 477:         return text.split(Regex("\\n\\s*\\n+"))
 478:             .map { it.trim() }
 479:             .filter { it.length >= 20 }
 480:             .ifEmpty {
 481:                 text.split(Regex("(?<=[.!?])\\s+"))
 482:                     .map { it.trim() }
 483:                     .filter { it.length >= 20 }
 484:             }
 485:     }
 486: }
 487: 
 488: data class ReaderUiState(
 489:     val content: ContentItem? = null,
 490:     val paragraphs: List<String> = emptyList(),
 491:     val currentParagraphIndex: Int = 0,
 492:     val currentWordHighlight: WordHighlight? = null,
 493:     val isTtsReady: Boolean = false,
 494:     val isPlaying: Boolean = false,
 495:     val canResume: Boolean = false,
 496:     val canSkipForward: Boolean = false,
 497:     val canRestart: Boolean = false,
 498:     val isLoadingVoice: Boolean = false,
 499:     val statusMessage: String = "Loading reader...",
 500:     val errorMessage: String? = null
 501: )
 502: 
 503: data class WordHighlight(
 504:     val start: Int,
 505:     val endExclusive: Int
 506: )
 507: 
 508: private data class ReaderSnapshot(
 509:     val content: ContentItem? = null,
 510:     val paragraphs: List<String> = emptyList(),
 511:     val currentParagraphIndex: Int = 0,
 512:     val isTtsReady: Boolean = false,
 513:     val isPlaying: Boolean = false,
 514:     val canResume: Boolean = false,
 515:     val canSkipForward: Boolean = false,
 516:     val canRestart: Boolean = false,
 517:     val isLoadingVoice: Boolean = false,
 518:     val statusMessage: String = "Loading reader..."
 519: )
 520: 
 521: private data class SpeechChunk(
 522:     val text: String,
 523:     val startOffset: Int
 524: )
 525: 
 526: private enum class TtsEngineState {
 527:     INITIALIZING,
 528:     READY,
 529:     FAILED
 530: }
 531: 
 532: private enum class PlaybackState {
 533:     IDLE,
 534:     PLAYING,
 535:     PAUSED
 536: }

```

```
Output:
   1: package com.scribespeak.app.data.language
   2: 
   3: import com.scribespeak.app.domain.language.LanguageDetector
   4: import javax.inject.Inject
   5: import javax.inject.Singleton
   6: 
   7: @Singleton
   8: class HeuristicLanguageDetector @Inject constructor() : LanguageDetector {
   9:     override fun detectLanguageCode(text: String): String? {
  10:         val sample = text.take(4_000)
  11:         if (sample.isBlank()) return null
  12: 
  13:         return when {
  14:             containsRange(sample, 0x0980, 0x09FF) -> "bn"
  15:             containsRange(sample, 0x0900, 0x097F) -> "hi"
  16:             containsRange(sample, 0x4E00, 0x9FFF) -> "zh"
  17:             containsRange(sample, 0x3040, 0x30FF) -> "ja"
  18:             containsRange(sample, 0xAC00, 0xD7AF) -> "ko"
  19:             containsRange(sample, 0x0400, 0x04FF) -> "ru"
  20:             containsRange(sample, 0x0600, 0x06FF) -> {
  21:                 if (sample.any { it in URDU_HINTS }) "ur" else "ar"
  22:             }
  23: 
  24:             else -> detectLatinLanguage(sample)
  25:         }
  26:     }
  27: 
  28:     private fun detectLatinLanguage(sample: String): String {
  29:         val lowered = sample.lowercase()
  30:         val scores = linkedMapOf(
  31:             "ms" to score(lowered, MALAY_HINTS),
  32:             "pt" to score(lowered, PORTUGUESE_HINTS),
  33:             "fr" to score(lowered, FRENCH_HINTS),
  34:             "es" to score(lowered, SPANISH_HINTS),
  35:             "de" to score(lowered, GERMAN_HINTS),
  36:             "it" to score(lowered, ITALIAN_HINTS),
  37:             "en" to score(lowered, ENGLISH_HINTS)
  38:         )
  39: 
  40:         return scores.maxByOrNull { it.value }?.takeIf { it.value > 0 }?.key ?: "en"
  41:     }
  42: 
  43:     private fun score(text: String, hints: List<String>): Int {
  44:         return hints.sumOf { hint ->
  45:             Regex("\\b${Regex.escape(hint)}\\b").findAll(text).count()
  46:         }
  47:     }
  48: 
  49:     private fun containsRange(text: String, start: Int, end: Int): Boolean {
  50:         return text.any { it.code in start..end }
  51:     }
  52: 
  53:     private companion object {
  54:         // Use escapes so these hints stay stable even if a terminal mangles Unicode output.
  55:         val URDU_HINTS = setOf('\u06D2', '\u06BA', '\u06BE', '\u0679', '\u0688', '\u0691', '\u0686')
  56:         val ENGLISH_HINTS = listOf("the", "and", "with", "from", "that", "this", "have")
  57:         val MALAY_HINTS = listOf("yang", "dan", "untuk", "dengan", "tidak", "dalam", "pada")
  58:         val SPANISH_HINTS = listOf("el", "la", "de", "que", "los", "para", "una", "con")
  59:         val FRENCH_HINTS = listOf("le", "la", "les", "des", "une", "avec", "pour", "est")
  60:         val GERMAN_HINTS = listOf("der", "die", "das", "und", "mit", "nicht", "eine")
  61:         val ITALIAN_HINTS = listOf("che", "con", "per", "una", "della", "sono", "degli")
  62:         val PORTUGUESE_HINTS = listOf("que", "com", "para", "uma", "nao", "como", "dos", "das")
  63:     }
  64: }
```

```
   5: import com.scribespeak.app.domain.model.SupportedLanguage
   6: import com.scribespeak.app.domain.repository.SettingsRepository
   7: import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
   8: import javax.inject.Inject
   9: import javax.inject.Singleton
  10: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
  11: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
  12: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
  13: 
  14: @Singleton
  15: class SharedPrefsSettingsRepository @Inject constructor(
  16:     @ApplicationContext context: Context
  17: ) : SettingsRepository {
  18:     private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences(PREFS_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
  19:     private val settingsState = MutableStateFlow(readSettings())
  20: 
  21:     override fun observeSpeechSettings(): Flow<SpeechSettings> = settingsState.asStateFlow()
  22: 
  23:     override suspend fun setAutoDetectLanguage(enabled: Boolean) {
  24:         prefs.edit()
  25:             .putBoolean(KEY_AUTO_DETECT_LANGUAGE, enabled)
  26:             .apply()
  27:         settingsState.value = readSettings()
  28:     }
  29: 
  30:     override suspend fun setPreferredLanguageCode(languageCode: String) {
  31:         prefs.edit()
  32:             .putString(KEY_PREFERRED_LANGUAGE_CODE, languageCode)
  33:             .apply()
  34:         settingsState.value = readSettings()
  35:     }
  36: 
  37:     private fun readSettings(): SpeechSettings {
  38:         return SpeechSettings(
  39:             autoDetectLanguage = prefs.getBoolean(KEY_AUTO_DETECT_LANGUAGE, true),
  40:             preferredLanguageCode = prefs.getString(
  41:                 KEY_PREFERRED_LANGUAGE_CODE,
  42:                 SupportedLanguage.default.code
  43:             ) ?: SupportedLanguage.default.code
  44:         )
  45:     }
  46: 
  47:     private companion object {
  48:         const val PREFS_NAME = "scribespeak_settings"
  49:         const val KEY_AUTO_DETECT_LANGUAGE = "auto_detect_language"
  50:         const val KEY_PREFERRED_LANGUAGE_CODE = "preferred_language_code"
  51:     }
  52: }
```

## [#143] Assistant
- Timestamp: `2026-05-31 08:07:52`

Settings now has a real speech-language flow. In [SettingsRoute.kt](C:/Users/Home/Desktop/Vibe%20Coding%20FYP/FYP_Vibe_Implementation/Codex/TTS_Application/app/src/main/java/com/scribespeak/app/ui/screens/settings/SettingsRoute.kt:28) and [SettingsViewModel.kt](C:/Users/Home/Desktop/Vibe%20Coding%20FYP/FYP_Vibe_Implementation/Codex/TTS_Application/app/src/main/java/com/scribespeak/app/ui/screens/settings/SettingsViewModel.kt:15), you can turn `Auto detect language` on or off and choose a manual speaking language when auto-detect is off. The setting is persisted in [SharedPrefsSettingsRepository.kt](C:/Users/Home/Desktop/Vibe%20Coding%20FYP/FYP_Vibe_Implementation/Codex/TTS_Application/app/src/main/java/com/scribespeak/app/data/settings/SharedPrefsSettingsRepository.kt:14), and Hilt is wired for it in [AppModule.kt](C:/Users/Home/Desktop/Vibe%20Coding%20FYP/FYP_Vibe_Implementation/Codex/TTS_Application/app/src/main/java/com/scribespeak/app/di/AppModule.kt:26).

The reader now respects those settings in [ReaderViewModel.kt](C:/Users/Home/Desktop/Vibe%20Coding%20FYP/FYP_Vibe_Implementation/Codex/TTS_Application/app/src/main/java/com/scribespeak/app/ui/screens/reader/ReaderViewModel.kt:345). Auto-detect uses the article’s stored language when available, otherwise falls back to a local heuristic detector in [HeuristicLanguageDetector.kt](C:/Users/Home/Desktop/Vibe%20Coding%20FYP/FYP_Vibe_Implementation/Codex/TTS_Application/app/src/main/java/com/scribespeak/app/data/language/HeuristicLanguageDetector.kt:8). I also expanded the supported manual language list in [SupportedLanguage.kt](C:/Users/Home/Desktop/Vibe%20Coding%20FYP/FYP_Vibe_Implementation/Codex/TTS_Application/app/src/main/java/com/scribespeak/app/domain/model/SupportedLanguage.kt:3) to include Malay, German, Italian, Japanese, and Korean in addition to the earlier set.

I couldn’t finish a local Gradle compile here because the wrapper download is failing with an SSL certificate error in this environment, so please do `Sync Project with Gradle Files` and build in Android Studio. If any compile/runtime issue shows up, send me the exact error and I’ll keep going.

```
package com.scribespeak.app.ui.screens.settings

import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Arrangement
import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Column
import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Row
import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxWidth
import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.padding
import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.weight
import androidx.compose.foundation.rememberScrollState
import androidx.compose.foundation.verticalScroll
import androidx.compose.material3.Card
import androidx.compose.material3.CardDefaults
import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme
import androidx.compose.material3.RadioButton
import androidx.compose.material3.Surface
import androidx.compose.material3.Switch
import androidx.compose.material3.Text
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
import androidx.hilt.navigation.compose.hiltViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.compose.collectAsStateWithLifecycle
import com.scribespeak.app.domain.model.SupportedLanguage

@Composable
fun SettingsRoute(
    viewModel: SettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel()
) {
    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()

    Surface(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
        Column(
            modifier = Modifier
                .fillMaxSize()
                .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
                .padding(20.dp),
            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
        ) {
            Text(
                text = "Settings",
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium,
                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
            )

            Card(
                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
                    containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondaryContainer
                )
            ) {
                Column(
                    modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)
                ) {
                    Text(
                        text = "Speech language",
                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
                    )
                    SettingSwitchRow(
                        title = "Auto detect language",
                        subtitle = "Detect the content language and switch TTS language automatically when possible.",
                        checked = uiState.speechSettings.autoDetectLanguage,
                        onCheckedChange = viewModel::setAutoDetectLanguage
                    )
                }
            }

            Card(
                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
                    containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerLow
                )
            ) {
                Column(
                    modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)
                ) {
                    Text(
                        text = "Manual language override",
                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
                    )
                    Text(
                        text = if (uiState.speechSettings.autoDetectLanguage) {
                            "Turn auto detect off to force one speaking language."
                        } else {
                            "Choose the language the reader should use for playback."
                        },
                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
                    )

                    uiState.supportedLanguages.forEach { language ->
                        LanguageChoiceRow(
                            language = language,
                            selected = uiState.speechSettings.preferredLanguageCode == language.code,
                            enabled = !uiState.speechSettings.autoDetectLanguage,
                            onSelect = {
                                viewModel.setPreferredLanguage(language.code)
                            }
                        )
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

@Composable
private fun SettingSwitchRow(
    title: String,
    subtitle: String,
    checked: Boolean,
    onCheckedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit
) {
    Row(
        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
    ) {
        Column(
            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)
        ) {
            Text(text = title, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge)
            Text(
                text = subtitle,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
            )
        }
        Switch(
            checked = checked,
            onCheckedChange = onCheckedChange
        )
    }
}

@Composable
private fun LanguageChoiceRow(
    language: SupportedLanguage,
    selected: Boolean,
    enabled: Boolean,
    onSelect: () -> Unit
) {
    Row(
        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
    ) {
        Column(
            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)
        ) {
            Text(
                text = language.displayName,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge
            )
            Text(
                text = language.localeTag,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
            )
        }
        RadioButton(
            selected = selected,
            onClick = onSelect,
            enabled = enabled
        )
    }
}
```

- Timestamp: `2026-05-31 08:11:27`

```
import androidx.compose.foundation.verticalScroll
import androidx.compose.material3.Card
import androidx.compose.material3.CardDefaults
import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme
import androidx.compose.material3.RadioButton
import androidx.compose.material3.Surface
import androidx.compose.material3.Switch
import androidx.compose.material3.Text
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
import androidx.hilt.navigation.compose.hiltViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.compose.collectAsStateWithLifecycle
import com.scribespeak.app.domain.model.SupportedLanguage

@Composable
fun SettingsRoute(
    viewModel: SettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel()
) {
    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()

    Surface(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
        Column(
            modifier = Modifier
                .fillMaxSize()
                .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
                .padding(20.dp),
            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
        ) {
            Text(
                text = "Settings",
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium,
                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
            )

            Card(
                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
                    containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondaryContainer
                )
            ) {
                Column(
                    modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)
                ) {
                    Text(
                        text = "Speech language",
                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
                    )
                    SettingSwitchRow(
                        title = "Auto detect language",
                        subtitle = "Detect the content language and switch TTS language automatically when possible.",
                        checked = uiState.speechSettings.autoDetectLanguage,
                        onCheckedChange = viewModel::setAutoDetectLanguage
                    )
                }
            }

            Card(
                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
                    containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerLow
                )
            ) {
                Column(
                    modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)
                ) {
                    Text(
                        text = "Manual language override",
                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
                    )
                    Text(
                        text = if (uiState.speechSettings.autoDetectLanguage) {
                            "Turn auto detect off to force one speaking language."
                        } else {
                            "Choose the language the reader should use for playback."
                        },
                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
                    )

                    uiState.supportedLanguages.forEach { language ->
                        LanguageChoiceRow(
                            language = language,
                            selected = uiState.speechSettings.preferredLanguageCode == language.code,
                            enabled = !uiState.speechSettings.autoDetectLanguage,
                            onSelect = {
                                viewModel.setPreferredLanguage(language.code)
                            }
                        )
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

@Composable
private fun SettingSwitchRow(
    title: String,
    subtitle: String,
    checked: Boolean,
    onCheckedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit
) {
    Row(
        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
    ) {
        Column(
            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)
        ) {
            Text(text = title, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge)
            Text(
                text = subtitle,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
            )
        }
        Switch(
            checked = checked,
            onCheckedChange = onCheckedChange
        )
    }
}

@Composable
private fun LanguageChoiceRow(
    language: SupportedLanguage,
    selected: Boolean,
    enabled: Boolean,
    onSelect: () -> Unit
) {
    Row(
        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
    ) {
        Column(
            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)
        ) {
            Text(
                text = language.displayName,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge
            )
            Text(
                text = language.localeTag,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
            )
        }
        RadioButton(
            selected = selected,
            onClick = onSelect,
            enabled = enabled
        )
    }
}
```

```
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 3.6 seconds
Output:
package com.scribespeak.app.data.web

import com.scribespeak.app.domain.extract.WebArticleExtractor
import com.scribespeak.app.domain.extract.WebArticleResult
import com.scribespeak.app.domain.util.normalizeUrl
import javax.inject.Inject
import javax.inject.Singleton
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
import okhttp3.Request
import org.jsoup.Jsoup
import org.jsoup.nodes.Document
import org.jsoup.nodes.Element

@Singleton
class JsoupWebArticleExtractor @Inject constructor(
    private val okHttpClient: OkHttpClient
) : WebArticleExtractor {
    override suspend fun extract(url: String): WebArticleResult {
        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
            val normalizedUrl = normalizeUrl(url)
            val request = Request.Builder()
                .url(normalizedUrl)
                .header(
                    "User-Agent",
                    "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14) AppleWebKit/537.36 " +
                        "(KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0 Mobile Safari/537.36"
                )
                .build()

            val response = okHttpClient.newCall(request).execute()
            if (!response.isSuccessful) {
                response.close()
                throw IllegalStateException("Request failed with HTTP ${response.code}")
            }

            val html = response.body?.string().orEmpty()
            response.close()

            if (html.isBlank()) {
                throw IllegalStateException("The page returned empty content.")
            }

            val document = Jsoup.parse(html, normalizedUrl)
            sanitize(document)

            val articleRoot = selectBestRoot(document)
            val extractedText = extractReadableText(articleRoot ?: document.body())

            if (extractedText.length < 120) {
                throw IllegalStateException("Couldn't find enough readable article text on that page.")
            }

            val title = resolveTitle(document, normalizedUrl)
            val languageCode = document.selectFirst("html")?.attr("lang")
                ?.substringBefore('-')
                ?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }

            WebArticleResult(
                normalizedUrl = normalizedUrl,
                title = title,
                extractedText = extractedText,
                languageCode = languageCode
            )
        }
    }

    private fun sanitize(document: Document) {
        document.select(
            "script, style, nav, footer, header, noscript, form, aside, " +
                "iframe, svg, button, input, figure figcaption"
        ).remove()
    }

    private fun selectBestRoot(document: Document): Element? {
        val candidates = document.select("article, main, [role=main], section, div")
            .distinct()

        return candidates.maxByOrNull { element ->
            val paragraphText = element.select("p").joinToString(" ") { it.text() }
            val paragraphCount = element.select("p").size
            val headingBonus = if (element.select("h1, h2").isNotEmpty()) 200 else 0
            paragraphText.length + (paragraphCount * 120) + headingBonus
        }?.takeIf { candidate ->
            candidate.text().length >= 200
        }
    }

    private fun extractReadableText(root: Element?): String {
        if (root == null) return ""

        val paragraphLikeText = root.select("h1, h2, h3, p, li, blockquote, pre")
            .map { it.text().trim() }
            .filter { it.length >= 30 }
            .distinct()

        if (paragraphLikeText.isNotEmpty()) {
            return paragraphLikeText.joinToString(separator = "\n\n")
        }

        return root.text()
            .split(Regex("(?<=[.!?])\\s+"))
            .map { it.trim() }
            .filter { it.length >= 30 }
            .joinToString(separator = "\n\n")
    }

    private fun resolveTitle(document: Document, normalizedUrl: String): String {
        val metaTitle = document.selectFirst("meta[property=og:title]")?.attr("content")
        val title = metaTitle?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
            ?: document.title().takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
            ?: normalizedUrl

        return title.trim()
    }
}

```

## [#156] Assistant
- Timestamp: `2026-05-31 08:25:13`

I’ve confirmed the current extractor is too naive for exactly the issues you described: it happily picks up “Recommended Stories”, tags, CTA blocks, and paywall scaffolding. I’m upgrading the extractor around three layers now: structured-data extraction first, stronger article-root selection, and aggressive junk/pruning rules for related stories, tags, ads, share blocks, and paywall noise.

## [#158] Assistant
- Timestamp: `2026-05-31 08:25:53`

I’ve got the extractor strategy mapped out now. The main fix is not one magic selector, it’s a stricter pipeline: prefer `articleBody` from structured data when a site provides it, then fall back to a much narrower content root, and finally prune/ignore known junk sections before the text ever reaches the reader.

## [#159] Assistant
- Timestamp: `2026-05-31 08:27:08`

The extractor rewrite is in. I’m exposing just enough of the parsing path for local tests so we can lock in regressions for those junk sections without needing live network access during unit tests.

## [#160] Assistant
- Timestamp: `2026-05-31 08:27:27`

I’m adding a few small HTML-fixture tests now. They won’t prove every live site, but they will lock in the exact failure modes we just saw: recommended-story blocks inside the body, trailing tags/CTA sections, and paywall scaffolding.

## [tool output]
- Call ID: `call_wJ23wVE1DZglikZ5r5Iwcrrs`
- Timestamp: `2026-05-31 08:28:03`

### Output
```
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 2.1 seconds
Output:
package com.scribespeak.app.data.web

import com.scribespeak.app.domain.extract.WebArticleExtractor
import com.scribespeak.app.domain.extract.WebArticleResult
import com.scribespeak.app.domain.util.normalizeUrl
import javax.inject.Inject
import javax.inject.Singleton
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
import okhttp3.Request
import org.json.JSONArray
import org.json.JSONObject
import org.jsoup.Jsoup
import org.jsoup.nodes.Document
import org.jsoup.nodes.Element

@Singleton
class JsoupWebArticleExtractor @Inject constructor(
    private val okHttpClient: OkHttpClient
) : WebArticleExtractor {
    override suspend fun extract(url: String): WebArticleResult {
        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
            val normalizedUrl = normalizeUrl(url)
            val request = Request.Builder()
                .url(normalizedUrl)
                .header(
                    "User-Agent",
                    "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14) AppleWebKit/537.36 " +
                        "(KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0 Mobile Safari/537.36"
                )
                .build()

            val response = okHttpClient.newCall(request).execute()
            if (!response.isSuccessful) {
                response.close()
                throw IllegalStateException("Request failed with HTTP ${response.code}")
            }

            val html = response.body?.string().orEmpty()
            response.close()

            if (html.isBlank()) {
                throw IllegalStateException("The page returned empty content.")
            }

            parseDocument(document = Jsoup.parse(html, normalizedUrl), normalizedUrl = normalizedUrl)
        }
    }

    internal fun parseDocument(document: Document, normalizedUrl: String): WebArticleResult {
        val structuredArticle = extractStructuredArticle(document)
        sanitize(document)

        val articleRoot = selectBestRoot(document)
        val extractedText = structuredArticle.articleBody
            ?.let(::normalizeText)
            ?.takeIf { it.length >= 180 }
            ?: extractReadableText(articleRoot ?: document.body())

        if (extractedText.length < 120) {
            throw IllegalStateException(
                if (looksPaywalled(document, extractedText)) {
                    "That page appears to hide the full article behind a paywall or app-only gate."
                } else {
                    "Couldn't find enough readable article text on that page."
                }
            )
        }

        val title = structuredArticle.title
            ?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
            ?: resolveTitle(document, normalizedUrl)
        val languageCode = structuredArticle.languageCode
            ?.substringBefore('-')
            ?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
            ?: document.selectFirst("html")?.attr("lang")
                ?.substringBefore('-')
                ?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }

        return WebArticleResult(
            normalizedUrl = normalizedUrl,
            title = title,
            extractedText = extractedText,
            languageCode = languageCode
        )
    }

    private fun sanitize(document: Document) {
        document.select(
            "script:not([type=application/ld+json]), style, nav, footer, header, " +
                "noscript, form, iframe, svg, button, input, picture, source, video, audio, canvas"
        ).remove()

        document.select("*").toList().forEach { element ->
            if (shouldPruneElement(element)) {
                element.remove()
            }
        }
    }

    private fun selectBestRoot(document: Document): Element? {
        val primarySelectors = listOf(
            "[itemprop=articleBody]",
            "[data-article-body]",
            "[data-module*=article]",
            ".article-body",
            ".article__body",
            ".article-content",
            ".article__content",
            ".story-body",
            ".story-content",
            ".entry-content",
            ".post-content",
            ".node__content",
            ".wysiwyg",
            "article .content",
            "article .body",
            "main article",
            "article"
        )

        primarySelectors.forEach { selector ->
            document.select(selector)
                .firstOrNull { candidate -> isValidContentRoot(candidate) }
                ?.let { return it }
        }

        val candidates = document.select("article, main, [role=main], section, div")
            .distinct()

        return candidates.maxByOrNull { element ->
            scoreContentRoot(element)
        }?.takeIf(::isValidContentRoot)
    }

    private fun extractReadableText(root: Element?): String {
        if (root == null) return ""

        val workingRoot = root.clone()
        workingRoot.select("*").toList().forEach { element ->
            if (shouldPruneElement(element)) {
                element.remove()
            }
        }

        val blocks = mutableListOf<String>()
        val seen = linkedSetOf<String>()

        for (element in workingRoot.select("h2, h3, h4, p, li, blockquote, pre")) {
            if (shouldSkipTextElement(element)) continue

            val text = normalizeText(element.text())
            if (text.isBlank()) continue

            if (isTerminalSectionHeading(text, element)) {
                break
            }

            if (isSkippableStandaloneText(text, element)) continue

            val minimumLength = if (element.tagName().startsWith("h")) 12 else 28
            if (text.length < minimumLength) continue
            if (seen.add(text)) {
                blocks += text
            }
        }

        if (blocks.isNotEmpty()) {
            return blocks.joinToString(separator = "\n\n")
        }

        return normalizeText(workingRoot.text())
            .split(Regex("(?<=[.!?ã€‚ï¼ï¼Ÿ])\\s+"))
            .map(::normalizeText)
            .filter { it.length >= 30 }
            .distinct()
            .joinToString(separator = "\n\n")
    }

    private fun resolveTitle(document: Document, normalizedUrl: String): String {
        val metaTitle = document.selectFirst("meta[property=og:title]")?.attr("content")
        val title = metaTitle?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
            ?: document.title().takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
            ?: normalizedUrl

        return title.trim()
    }

    private fun extractStructuredArticle(document: Document): StructuredArticle {
        val articleNodes = mutableListOf<JSONObject>()

        document.select("script[type=application/ld+json]").forEach { script ->
            val json = script.data().trim()
            if (json.isBlank()) return@forEach

            runCatching {
                collectStructuredArticleNodes(json, articleNodes)
            }
        }

        val bestNode = articleNodes.maxByOrNull { node ->
            node.optString("articleBody").length * 3 +
                node.optString("description").length +
                node.optString("headline").length
        }

        return StructuredArticle(
            title = bestNode?.optString("headline")?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() },
            articleBody = bestNode?.optString("articleBody")?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
                ?: bestNode?.optString("description")?.takeIf { it.length >= 180 },
            languageCode = bestNode?.optString("inLanguage")?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
        )
    }

    private fun collectStructuredArticleNodes(json: String, sink: MutableList<JSONObject>) {
        val trimmed = json.trim()
        when {
            trimmed.startsWith("[") -> collectStructuredArticleNodes(JSONArray(trimmed), sink)
            trimmed.startsWith("{") -> collectStructuredArticleNodes(JSONObject(trimmed), sink)
        }
    }

    private fun collectStructuredArticleNodes(array: JSONArray, sink: MutableList<JSONObject>) {
        for (index in 0 until array.length()) {
            when (val item = array.opt(index)) {
                is JSONObject -> collectStructuredArticleNodes(item, sink)
                is JSONArray -> collectStructuredArticleNodes(item, sink)
            }
        }
    }

    private fun collectStructuredArticleNodes(node: JSONObject, sink: MutableList<JSONObject>) {
        if (node.isLikelyArticleNode()) {
            sink += node
        }

        node.optJSONArray("@graph")?.let { collectStructuredArticleNodes(it, sink) }
        node.optJSONObject("mainEntity")?.let { collectStructuredArticleNodes(it, sink) }
        node.optJSONObject("mainEntityOfPage")?.let { collectStructuredArticleNodes(it, sink) }
    }

    private fun JSONObject.isLikelyArticleNode(): Boolean {
        val typeValue = opt("@type")
        val types = when (typeValue) {
            is JSONArray -> buildList {
                for (index in 0 until typeValue.length()) {
                    add(typeValue.optString(index))
                }
            }

            else -> listOf(optString("@type"))
        }.map { it.lowercase() }

        return types.any { type ->
            type.contains("article") || type.contains("newsarticle") || type.contains("report")
        }
    }

    private fun isValidContentRoot(element: Element): Boolean {
        if (element == null) return false
        if (shouldPruneElement(element)) return false
        if (element.text().length < 180) return false
        return scoreContentRoot(element) >= 280
    }

    private fun scoreContentRoot(element: Element): Int {
        val paragraphCount = element.select("p").size
        val paragraphTextLength = element.select("p").sumOf { it.text().length }
        val articleHint = if (hasArticleHint(element)) 250 else 0
        val bodyHint = if (hasBodyHint(element)) 180 else 0
        val junkPenalty = if (hasJunkHint(element)) 500 else 0

        return paragraphTextLength + (paragraphCount * 120) + articleHint + bodyHint - junkPenalty
    }

    private fun shouldPruneElement(element: Element): Boolean {
        val ownText = normalizeText(element.ownText())
        val combinedHints = buildString {
            append(element.tagName())
            append(' ')
            append(element.id())
            append(' ')
            append(element.className())
            append(' ')
            append(element.attr("role"))
            append(' ')
            append(element.attr("aria-label"))
            append(' ')
            append(element.attr("data-testid"))
            append(' ')
            append(element.attr("data-module"))
        }.lowercase()

        if (combinedHints.contains("article-body") || combinedHints.contains("article__body")) {
            return false
        }

        if (combinedHints.anyContains(PRUNE_KEYWORDS)) {
            return true
        }

        if (combinedHints.contains("ad") && !hasArticleHint(element)) {
            return true
        }

        return isStandaloneJunkHeading(ownText)
    }

    private fun shouldSkipTextElement(element: Element): Boolean {
        val text = normalizeText(element.text())
        if (text.isBlank()) return true
        if (element.parents().any(::shouldPruneElement)) return true
        if (text.anyContains(SKIP_TEXT_PATTERNS)) return true
        return false
    }

    private fun isSkippableStandaloneText(text: String, element: Element): Boolean {
        if (text.anyContains(SKIP_TEXT_PATTERNS)) return true
        if (element.tagName() == "li" && text.length < 45) return true
        return false
    }

    private fun isTerminalSectionHeading(text: String, element: Element): Boolean {
        if (!element.tagName().startsWith("h")) return false

        val normalized = text.lowercase()
        return TERMINAL_SECTION_HEADINGS.any { marker ->
            normalized == marker || normalized.startsWith("$marker:")
        }
    }

    private fun isStandaloneJunkHeading(text: String): Boolean {
        if (text.isBlank()) return false
        val normalized = text.lowercase()
        return STANDALONE_JUNK_HEADINGS.any { marker ->
            normalized == marker || normalized.startsWith("$marker:")
        }
    }

    private fun looksPaywalled(document: Document, extractedText: String): Boolean {
        val pageText = normalizeText(document.text())
        if (extractedText.length >= 220) return false

        return pageText.anyContains(
            listOf(
                "unlocking article",
                "subscribe to continue",
                "subscriber only",
                "sign in to read",
                "login to continue",
                "members only"
            )
        )
    }

    private fun hasArticleHint(element: Element): Boolean {
        val hints = "${element.id()} ${element.className()} ${element.attr("itemprop")}".lowercase()
        return hints.anyContains(listOf("article", "story", "entry", "post", "content"))
    }

    private fun hasBodyHint(element: Element): Boolean {
        val hints = "${element.id()} ${element.className()} ${element.attr("itemprop")}".lowercase()
        return hints.anyContains(listOf("body", "main", "text", "copy", "content"))
    }

    private fun hasJunkHint(element: Element): Boolean {
        val hints = "${element.id()} ${element.className()}".lowercase()
        return hints.anyContains(PRUNE_KEYWORDS)
    }

    private fun normalizeText(text: String): String {
        return text
            .replace('\u00A0', ' ')
            .replace(Regex("[\\t\\x0B\\f\\r ]+"), " ")
            .replace(Regex("\\n{3,}"), "\n\n")
            .lines()
            .map { it.trim() }
            .filter { it.isNotBlank() }
            .joinToString("\n")
            .trim()
    }

    private fun String.anyContains(values: List<String>): Boolean {
        return values.any { value -> contains(value, ignoreCase = true) }
    }

    private data class StructuredArticle(
        val title: String? = null,
        val articleBody: String? = null,
        val languageCode: String? = null
    )

    private companion object {
        val PRUNE_KEYWORDS = listOf(
            "recommend",
            "related",
            "most-read",
            "mostread",
            "most-commented",
            "popular",
            "trending",
            "share",
            "social",
            "newsletter",
            "subscribe",
            "comment",
            "cookie",
            "consent",
            "breadcrumb",
            "promo",
            "advert",
            "ad-container",
            "adslot",
            "taboola",
            "outbrain",
            "next-post",
            "read-more",
            "more-like-this",
            "tag-list",
            "topics",
            "paywall",
            "locked",
            "unlocking",
            "audio-broadcast",
            "call-to-action"
        )

        val SKIP_TEXT_PATTERNS = listOf(
            "recommended stories",
            "related reports",
            "read more like this",
            "view comments",
            "unlocking article",
            "help us get the word out",
            "audio broadcast",
            "call to action",
            "please join the",
            "advertisement",
            "ads"
        )

        val TERMINAL_SECTION_HEADINGS = listOf(
            "tags",
            "help us get the word out",
            "audio broadcast",
            "call to action",
            "related reports",
            "next post"
        )

        val STANDALONE_JUNK_HEADINGS = listOf(
            "recommended stories",
            "related reports",
            "read more like this",
            "view comments",
            "audio broadcast",
            "call to action",
            "unlocking article",
            "advertisement"
        )
    }
}

```

```
Output:
package com.scribespeak.app.data.web

import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
import org.jsoup.Jsoup
import org.junit.Assert.assertEquals
import org.junit.Assert.assertFalse
import org.junit.Assert.assertTrue
import org.junit.Test

class JsoupWebArticleExtractorTest {
    private val extractor = JsoupWebArticleExtractor(OkHttpClient())

    @Test
    fun `structured article body is preferred over noisy page chrome`() {
        val html = """
            <html lang="en">
            <head>
                <title>Fallback title</title>
                <script type="application/ld+json">
                {
                  "@context": "https://schema.org",
                  "@type": "NewsArticle",
                  "headline": "Structured title",
                  "inLanguage": "en-US",
                  "articleBody": "First real paragraph with enough words to be meaningful and clearly part of the article.\n\nSecond real paragraph continues the story without any recommendation widgets or tags attached."
                }
                </script>
            </head>
            <body>
                <div class="recommended">Recommended Stories</div>
                <article>
                    <p>Noise that should not win because structured data is better.</p>
                </article>
            </body>
            </html>
        """.trimIndent()

        val result = extractor.parseDocument(Jsoup.parse(html, "https://example.com/story"), "https://example.com/story")

        assertEquals("Structured title", result.title)
        assertEquals("en", result.languageCode)
        assertTrue(result.extractedText.startsWith("First real paragraph"))
        assertFalse(result.extractedText.contains("Recommended Stories"))
    }

    @Test
    fun `recommended stories and ads are removed from article body`() {
        val html = """
            <html lang="en">
            <body>
                <article class="article-body">
                    <h1>Headline</h1>
                    <p>This opening paragraph contains enough text to count as the real beginning of the article and should be preserved fully.</p>
                    <div class="recommended">
                        <h2>Recommended Stories</h2>
                        <p>This should never appear in the extracted output because it is not part of the main article.</p>
                    </div>
                    <p>This follow-up paragraph continues the reporting and should still appear after the recommendation block is stripped out.</p>
                    <div class="advertisement">Advertisement</div>
                    <p>This closing paragraph is also real article text and should remain available to the reader.</p>
                </article>
            </body>
            </html>
        """.trimIndent()

        val result = extractor.parseDocument(Jsoup.parse(html, "https://example.com/article"), "https://example.com/article")

        assertTrue(result.extractedText.contains("opening paragraph"))
        assertTrue(result.extractedText.contains("follow-up paragraph"))
        assertTrue(result.extractedText.contains("closing paragraph"))
        assertFalse(result.extractedText.contains("Recommended Stories"))
        assertFalse(result.extractedText.contains("Advertisement"))
        assertFalse(result.extractedText.contains("never appear"))
    }

    @Test
    fun `tags and call to action sections are excluded`() {
        val html = """
            <html lang="en">
            <body>
                <article class="post-content">
                    <h1>Ministry leader urges caution as Christians turn to AI for guidance</h1>
                    <p>USA (MNN) â€” This first paragraph is part of the story and contains enough substance to represent the article body properly for extraction.</p>
                    <p>The second paragraph adds more reporting detail, context, and quoted material so the test resembles a realistic article structure.</p>
                    <h4>Tags:</h4>
                    <p>AI artificial intelligence barna research</p>
                    <h3>Help us get the word out:</h3>
                    <p>Share Tweet Share</p>
                    <h3>Audio Broadcast</h3>
                    <p>Download 1min 2min 4-5min</p>
                </article>
            </body>
            </html>
        """.trimIndent()

        val result = extractor.parseDocument(Jsoup.parse(html, "https://example.com/mnn"), "https://example.com/mnn")

        assertTrue(result.extractedText.contains("first paragraph"))
        assertTrue(result.extractedText.contains("second paragraph"))
        assertFalse(result.extractedText.contains("Tags:"))
        assertFalse(result.extractedText.contains("Help us get the word out"))
        assertFalse(result.extractedText.contains("Audio Broadcast"))
    }

    @Test
    fun `paywall scaffolding returns a clearer error`() {
        val html = """
            <html lang="en">
            <body>
                <main>
                    <article>
                        <h1>Locked story</h1>
                        <p>This brief summary teases the story but is not enough to represent a full article for the reader.</p>
                        <div>Unlocking Article</div>
                        <div>Please subscribe to continue reading.</div>
                    </article>
                </main>
            </body>
            </html>
        """.trimIndent()

        val error = runCatching {
            extractor.parseDocument(Jsoup.parse(html, "https://example.com/locked"), "https://example.com/locked")
        }.exceptionOrNull()

        assertEquals(
            "That page appears to hide the full article behind a paywall or app-only gate.",
            error?.message
        )
    }
}
```

## [#162] Assistant

I caught a couple of important edge cases in the rewrite itself. I’m tightening those before you test: one was an over-broad ad hint that could accidentally match normal words, and the other was making sure standalone “Recommended Stories” sections get removed as a container, not just as a heading line.

```
  18: @Singleton
  19: class JsoupWebArticleExtractor @Inject constructor(

  21: ) : WebArticleExtractor {
  22:     override suspend fun extract(url: String): WebArticleResult {
  23:         return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
  24:             val normalizedUrl = normalizeUrl(url)
  25:             val request = Request.Builder()
  26:                 .url(normalizedUrl)
  27:                 .header(
  28:                     "User-Agent",

  33: 
  34:             val response = okHttpClient.newCall(request).execute()
  35:             if (!response.isSuccessful) {
  36:                 response.close()
  37:                 throw IllegalStateException("Request failed with HTTP ${response.code}")
  38:             }
  39: 
  40:             val html = response.body?.string().orEmpty()
  41:             response.close()

  44:                 throw IllegalStateException("The page returned empty content.")

  46:

  48:         }

  51:     internal fun parseDocument(document: Document, normalizedUrl: String): WebArticleResult {
  52:         val structuredArticle = extractStructuredArticle(document)
  53:         sanitize(document)
  54: 
  55:         val articleRoot = selectBestRoot(document)
  56:         val extractedText = structuredArticle.articleBody
  57:             ?.let(::normalizeText)
  58:             ?.takeIf { it.length >= 180 }
  59:             ?: extractReadableText(articleRoot ?: document.body())
  60:

  70: 
  71:         val title = structuredArticle.title
  72:             ?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
  73:             ?: resolveTitle(document, normalizedUrl)
  74:         val languageCode = structuredArticle.languageCode
  75:             ?.substringBefore('-')
  76:             ?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
  77:             ?: document.selectFirst("html")?.attr("lang")
  78:                 ?.substringBefore('-')

  89:     private fun sanitize(document: Document) {

  98:             }
```
